name: ComfyUI Runner Stub
purpose: Validate ComfyUI batch files and prepare queue payload previews without sending real render jobs yet.
runner_rules: Do not send real ComfyUI queue prompts until Shot 006 rules are verified.
Always process repair batch before full keyframe batch.
Every generated file must go through TV Review before assembly.
The dashboard remains the production brain; ComfyUI only renders images.
future_send_mode_requirements: COMFYUI_URL must be set or confirmed
At least one selected job must pass validation
Runner must write a render receipt manifest after queueing
